---
title: 'Truthical - The Role Is Yours | @GatewayPeople Southlake Texas'
date: '2014-12-14T20:02:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1326629304423826580'
blogger_filename: '/2014/12/truthical-role-is-yours-gatewaypeople.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
  - 'Discover'
---

<h2 style="text-align: left;">Truthical - The Role Is Yours (Musical)</h2><h3 style="text-align: left;"><a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/113284816242244797515" target="_blank">+GatewayPeople</a>&nbsp;Gateway Church, Southlake Texas</h3><br /><br /><h4>Overview</h4>I'm sorry to be writing after the weekend is over... next year I should go on Friday and write so that other will still have time to know. Maybe you'll find this next year&nbsp;and plan to go in December 2015 (and beyond). <br /><br />This is a musical play, written, directed, and produced by and for Gateway Church, in Southlake Texas. This was put in annually on Fri, Sat, and Sun. The musical takes paradies from some of the best known plays, musicals, sitcoms, and cartoons... stories of any kind... and weaves them into a beutifal "meaning on Christmas" and "meaning of Christ" message. I was laughing and crying, which is not common from someone as stoic as I try to be. <br /><br />If you ever find that Gateway has put on a play or musical production, it is a MUST go, even if you are not a church goer... maybe especially if you are not. <br /><br /><br /><h4>Cost</h4>FREE... or, "your life". If you had been there, you'd get the reference. <br /><br /><br /><h4>Kids</h4>I brought the kids into the show, instead of taking them to children's church, and they enjoyed it as much as I did. There was fog, and lights, and fireworks, and explosions... funny parady excerpt adaptations of plays such as Cats, and Fiddler on the Roof. Maybe adaptation is the wrong word. Maybe <a href="http://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/homage">Homage</a>, or allusion, would be a better word?<br /><br /><h4>Tips to enjoy it better...</h4>Do not go at 10:45 am on Sunday. That is the busiest service. I suggest going Friday or Saturday. <br /><br /><br /><h4>Final Thoughts</h4>I was left profoundly impacted... I was left with a feeling that has been with me no 24 hours... <br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br />Is this it? Is there more? Is this my only role? So I accept Jesus and die and go to heaven... what about life now? Is there more to my purpose and calling on this planet now? The answer is yes... the WHAT... now THAT is the question! </blockquote><b>Life In Fort Worth By <a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br /><h4>Blog Connect:</h4><ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li><li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li><li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li><li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li></ul><h4>Connect:</h4><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: left;"><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR FACEBOOK--><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-436ed0b74b58.png" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" /> </a><!-- END OF THE CODE FOR FACEBOOK--><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR TWITTER --><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-0d130abda9d2.png" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><!--  END OF THE CODE FOR TWITTER --><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR YOU-TUBE  --><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-df42b17a5900.jpg" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><!-- END OF THE CODE FOR YOU-TUBE --><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR YOUR RSS FEED--><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-d57cc3305733.jpg" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><!--  END OF THE CODE FOR YOUR RSS FEED--></div><br /><br /><h4>Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4><i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i><br /><i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at: <a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i><br /><h4><b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4><div><b><br /></b></div>
